reviews.review_description:
KANVAZ is totally worth the money, I'm happy I bought it. 
Honestly, it is such a real feeling that your arm starts being tired after a while! 😂😂 But the overall feeling works out fine to me. I used the autocorrect while drawing, as I found it demanding for my poor skills to stay in the correct space...
 I'm no painter but this truly offered a positive feeling and the fact that you can switch different 360 scenarios (I LOVE that you can place the painting wherever you want to, to immerse yourself even more) is amazing.
The offered amount of paintings is decent, would have loved to see more of them but hopefully something new will come up.
It is strange, thou, and this is my kind suggestion to the devs, that they could add a blank painting to work on. Choosing different brushes, colours, maybe even mixing them. Would be a positive add that could boost the game overall opinion.
It is suggested for everyone, as it's super easy to approach and it's very "merciful" while using the autocorrect on 😜 
Good work, devs!

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the detail review.. it's great to hear that you've had an overall positive experience! Blank canvas and extra brushes is a good idea, we will consider these feature in the future updates ;)

reviews.review_description: Painting in vr is great and as soon as I launched this there was a simple tutorial on the right, my canvas in front of me, I picked up a brush and started painting and everything felt right. The brush simulates on the canvas (like it bends the tip and stuff) so you feel like you're really painting but then any brush strokes that go over the lines fade away like magic. I'm still exploring this app and I already asked the dev about mx ink support and they've gone and ordered one!

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the review! Regarding the MX Ink Pen integration, we're currently facing sourcing issues, as it's been very hard to find suppliers selling the pen. However, the shipment is currently on the way, and the MX Pen integration update is estimated to be delivered around May 30. Sorry for the inconvenience, and thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description: Such a great game.  A great tutorial to walk you through what is a relaxing app.  So many settings, great music, great locations to unleash your artistic ability in with lots of art to choose to paint.  What I like is in one setting you can splash the paint and it is really forgiving going if you over paint the lines. Or as you get better you can turn the setting off to be more precise, there is an easy option to see what colours go where. Once you complete your painting you have a lovely option to hang it in a gallery. One to get...

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're really glad you're enjoying the experience - it truly means a lot to our team. Wishing you a wonderful day!

reviews.review_description: Nice little app for wiling away some time in a relaxing environment. It would be fun to be able to customise the palette and choose custom colours, bougie up those old classics 😄

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the review! Custom palette is a great idea - we'll definitely consider it for a future update ;)

reviews.review_description:
One of those hidden gems that can easily get lost amongst the multitude of apps.
Just one of the best paining apps I have played, so relaxing & zen like, so many genres to paint, just such a lovely experience, well done to the dev for making a beautiful app.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review — we really appreciate it! So glad you’re enjoying the chill vibe and the variety in our art collection :)

reviews.review_description: I have thoroughly enjoyed using this app,  it is a great de-stress app.  You are guided almost like a paint by numbers  Thankfully, it is very forgiving as it is easy to go over the lines, but the auto correct saves the day. The music and background help relax whilst you create your masterpiece ready to hang in the gallery. Great for short sessions or winding down  Definitely one for the library.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the feedback - really glad to hear it helps you relax and unwind after a busy day!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game. It was so relaxing just sitting there painting. Lots of options.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. I’m glad to hear that you enjoyed the App!

reviews.review_description: Very cool game, very chill.  I cannot paint at all, so having this auto correct the lines is great.  But if you are a skilled painter you can take off the auto correct.  The 'studio' has many places to move to to sit and paint, but the scenery looking out the windows is very cool.  Very fun little chill game.

I just tried Kanvaz and am very pleased with it.

I previously tried a different painting app and quickly got frustrated by my lack of skill or talent. That’s on me, but still...

Kanvaz lets me relax and enjoy the painting process without worrying about going outside the lines or figuring out what every brush does. The interface is easy to understand, the tools feel realistic enough to be satisfying, and there are several spectacular environments where you can wander around your studio and admire either the scenery or your artwork hanging on the walls. You can also play in pass thru and paint in your own living room. 

I haven’t explored everything yet, but it seems to offer a good variety of pictures and styles to experiment with.

Overall, I’m very happy with this app. My goal was to have fun, not stress about brush strokes, and Kanvaz absolutely achieves that.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the thoughtful review! I’m glad to hear that you're enjoyed and happy with the experience ;)

reviews.review_description:
Exactly what I want in a painting app.  A peaceful environment, calming music, inspiration, and a canvas.  The ability to use paint by number is a great addition for those like me who know no bounds.
Thanks for the great app.

This is beautiful and so easy to use.  Great for seated gameplay. Reminded me of the old colouring with water books, from my childhood. But the opposite lol.   Thanks so much for this. So many choices!

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the review! Happy to hear you enjoyed the experience ;)
